Solutions
Planetary problems. Global solutions. Local deployment.
  • Production Optimization
    Unlock the full production potential of your asset, across the entire lifecycle.
  • Recovery Enhancement
    Maximize your return on investment - recover more, monetize faster, and produce for longer
  • Plug and Abandonment
    Efficiently decommission your well—with integrity.
  • Data and AI Platform
    Engineered AI for the Energy Industry
  • Accelerated Time to Market
    Access more mature field reserves and bring green fields online faster and with longer sustainable performance.
  • Performance Assurance
    Redefine what’s achievable for your system-level optimization.
  • Methane and Flaring Elimination
    Remove methane and flaring emissions from your operations. For good.
  • Emissions Reduction
    Reduce operational emissions and environmental impact with quantifiably proven, reliable technologies.
  • Geothermal
    Tap into Earth's heat as a reliable, renewable resource.
  • Carbon Capture and Storage
    Accelerate progress with effective solutions across the CCUS value chain.
  • Digital Operations
    Drive the next step change of operational performance
  • Integrated Energy Solutions
    Integrate subsurface, well, and facilities planning to minimize delays and control costs.

Featured Highlights
Tela agentic-AI assistant

Engineered intelligence. AI by SLB.

Reveal wireline surveillance solutions

Boost production in mature fields with powerful, precise intervention diagnosis

Smackover 3D five-layer model

Providing detailed, five-layered geological insights to identify lithium-rich zones faster and with higher certainty in the Smackover Formation

Featured Highlights
Climate Action

Our journey to lower emissions, decarbonizing customer operations, and scaling new energy systems.

People

We put people first by respecting human rights, building a more inclusive workplace, and driving positive socioeconomic outcomes.

Nature

We've identified three key areas that are significant for our operations: biodiversity, water, and circularity.

          Focus

          Accelerating decarbonization and innovating across the entire energy landscape with leading science, engineering and digital expertise

          We create and deploy the technology and systems needed to simultaneously reduce emissions while meeting the world’s growing energy demands, ensuring progress for people and the planet, on the journey to net zero and beyond.​
          Explore our approach

          Decarbonizing Industry

          Working together to abate emissions.

          Innovating in Oil and Gas

          Improving performance in the oil and gas industry.

          Scaling New Energy Systems

          Accelerating the transition to low-carbon energy.

          Delivering Digital at Scale

          Accelerating your time to value.

          Latest news

          SLB joins YPF´s Initiative to Advance the Development of Technical Skills in Vaca Muerta

          17th March 2026 Update

          SLB OneSubsea Awarded Integrated EPC Contract for Deepwater Development

          12th March 2026 News Release
          SLB Solutions

          Solving industry’s most pressing challenges

          Ensuring the sustainability, security, and equity of energy access means we must think big. We need global solutions that can be scaled and adopted quickly. SLB’s know-how and technology are helping to overcome industry's greatest challenges while transforming energy. See which solutions meet your needs.
          Explore our solutions

          Production Optimization

          Improve producing asset performance and recovery with integrated chemical, mechanical, and digital solutions.

          Recovery Enhancement

          Maximize your return on investment - recover more, monetize faster, and produce for longer

          Plug and Abandonment

          Identify cost-saving P&A opportunities early on for achieving secure and compliant well integrity

          Data and AI Platform

          Unlock business performance with unmatched collection, curation, and intelligent interpretation of your data.

          Accelerated Time to Market

          Access more mature field reserves and bring green fields online faster and with longer sustainable performance.

          Performance Assurance

          Redefine what’s achievable for your system-level optimization.

          Methane and Flaring Elimination

          Remove methane and flaring emissions from your operations. For good.

          Emissions Reduction

          Reduce operational emissions and environmental impact with quantifiably proven, reliable technologies.

          Geothermal

          Geothermal energy is a sustainable energy source with unique advantages in the energy transition and for meeting the electricity demands of the future.

          Carbon Capture and Storage

          Propel your project with a full value chain of technology solutions.

          Integrated Energy Solutions

          Comprehensive, full life cycle project support, including well construction, subsea, and project management.
          Sustainability

          SLB 2025 Sustainability Report

          View the interactive report to see the progress SLB is making against its sustainability priorities of climate action, people, and nature.

          View Report
